memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials const &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, TSharedPtr< AccelByte::FApiClient, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > const &InApiClient=nullptr)
memberdef.name: TurnManager

memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials const &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, FAccelBytePlatformPtr const &InAccelBytePlatform)
memberdef.name: TurnManager

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsTurnServerList.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsTurnServerList.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsTurnServer.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsTurnServer.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FString &Region, THandler< int32 > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetTurnServerLatencyByRegion

briefdescription.para: Get turn server metrics by specific region.

parameterdescription.para: Specified region to get the server metrics
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is the latency of specified region.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Region, FString const &Ip, int Port, THandler< FAccelByteModelsTurnServerCredential > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetTurnCredential

briefdescription.para: Get credential to authenticate with the turn server.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsTurnServerCredential.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &SelectedTurnServerRegion, EP2PConnectionType P2PConnectionType, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 Latency=INDEX_NONE)
memberdef.name: SendMetric

briefdescription.para: Send info about P2P connection type and selected turn server region to BE. This called by client.

parameterdescription.para: Selected turn server region
P2P connection type enum (host, relay, srflx, or prflx)
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
It will send to turn server metrics if specified

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (const THandler< TArray< TPair< FString, float > > > &OnPingRegionsSuccess, const FErrorHandler &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetTurnServerLatencies

param.type: const THandler< TArray< TPair< FString, float > > > &

briefdescription.para: Sets QosServers, using this cache for future calls.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

briefdescription.para: TurnManager API to manage Qos Server(s).
